Name: pict-provider-theme
Description: Pict provider for runtime theme management — registers theme bundles (token maps + CSS + SVG + image assets), applies them by injecting CSS custom properties into a single <style> element, supports dark/light/system modes via a class on <html>, and exposes jellyfish template tags ({~Theme:~}, {~ThemeVar:~}, {~ThemeAsset:~}, {~ThemeImage:~}) for token resolution in templates. Stateless — host applications own theme persistence.
